name: New South Venison Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with salt, a few grains of cayenne, thyme, nutmeg, and cloves into a bowl.
2. Pound the seasoned mixture into venison steak until evenly coated.
3. Cut the steak into 1-inch cubes.
4. Heat melted beef suet in a heavy stewpot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
5. Sear the venison on all sides, adding thinly sliced onions to the pot.
6. When the meat and onions are well browned, add tomatoes, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, Burgundy, clove, garlic, and bouquet garni.
7. Cover the pot tightly and place it in a moderate oven (around 325°F/160°C).
8. Cook for 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
9. Remove from the oven and add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Bring the mixture to a boil over direct heat.
11. Stir in sauteed mushroom caps and serve with wild rice and red currant jelly.
